Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.iam.model

Class StorageActions

java.lang.Object
com.salesforce.multicloudj.iam.model.StorageActions
public final class StorageActions extends Object
Pre-defined storage service actions for IAM policies.

These constants represent common storage operations that can be used in policy statements across AWS S3, GCP Cloud Storage, and other cloud providers.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Action
    ALL
    Wildcard action representing all storage operations
    static final Action
    CREATE_BUCKET
    Action to create a new bucket/container
    static final Action
    DELETE_BUCKET
    Action to delete a bucket/container
    static final Action
    DELETE_OBJECT
    Action to delete objects from storage
    static final Action
    GET_BUCKET_LOCATION
    Action to get bucket location/metadata
    static final Action
    GET_OBJECT
    Action to read objects from storage
    static final Action
    LIST_BUCKET
    Action to list objects in a bucket/container
    static final Action
    PUT_OBJECT
    Action to write/upload objects to storage
